# UC-14.10.14 · Aranet Cross-Floor Temperature Consistency Analysis

## Description

High spread across floors on the same loop hints balancing issues or rogue space heaters.

## Value

Improves tenant comfort scores and chiller efficiency.

## Implementation

(1) Require floor metadata. (2) Compare at same OAT window. (3) Feed commissioning reports.

## SPL

```spl
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-24h
| eval floor=coalesce(floor, level, "")
| eval temp=tonumber(coalesce(temp_c, ""))
| eval building=coalesce(building, site, "main")
| stats avg(temp) as avg_temp stdev(temp) as temp_spread by floor building
```

## Visualization

Bar avg by floor; error bar spread.

## References

- [Aranet — environmental monitoring](https://aranet.com/)
- [ASHRAE — IAQ](https://www.ashrae.org/)
- [OSHA indoor air](https://www.osha.gov/indoor-air-quality)
